theater_description: Urban battle for Marawi city from the failed government raid and militant seizure through the final clearance of the last militant-held blocks.
geometry_method_note: Episode tracks Marawi city residents and city-fighting forces only; displaced populations elsewhere in Mindanao are treated as outflow context rather than denominator stock.
military_area_note: Combatant exposure aggregates Philippine government forces committed to the urban battle and militants inside the city footprint.
civilian_area_note: Civilian exposure begins with city residents present at onset, then falls steeply because the battle produced mass flight within days and only a trapped/hostage population remained in the core combat zone.
split_reason: A single city-bounded episode is analytically strongest because displacement, entrapment, clearance, and final reduction occurred in one continuous urban siege.
quality_note: The denominator logic is battle-bounded and reproducible, but the civilian death numerator is likely a confirmed floor and government troop exposure after June is only approximately observed.
